summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new restaurant management features: Quick Mode, Markets CRUD, Product Calculator, Inventory Tracker, Cashflow Tracker, and CSV Export functionality. Fixed critical Sales Dashboard import issue during testing.
passed_tests: Quick Mode - tap +/- counters, market selection, payment entry, session saving
Markets CRUD - add new market, edit existing, delete market operations
Product Calculator - ingredient management, COGS preview, auto-calculation
Inventory Tracker - stock recording with supplier info and date tracking
Cashflow Tracker - monthly targets, actual sales auto-fill, chart visualization
Sales Dashboard - export buttons for Sessions CSV and Products CSV
Navigation sidebar - all 13 menu items present and functional
Backend APIs - 23/23 tests passing (100% after cashflow fix)
Products/COGS page - product listing and COGS summary display
App initialization - proper loading and data seeding
